name: Filibustering with Klukai
description:
"I met some people I knew in the past recently...They say that I've changed. Do you think so too, Commander?"

Exilium Alternate Universe:

What if SKK decided to go with Squad 404?

This is a plothole that's been bothering me for quite a long while - the agreement SKK made with Mr. Griffin never specified Squad 404, which had never been under any official command or had any official affiliation with authorities, so there'd be no reason for SKK to go full lone wolf. Not to mention, Klukai's story is really frustrating and saddening, too.
creator: Hatsiroku
